Table 3: U.S. Treasury Securities Held by Foreign Residents 1/									
All Countries and International and Regional Organizations									
A positive number for net U.S. sales to foreigners denotes an increase in a foreign position									
Millions of dollars									
Link: https://ticdata.treasury.gov/resource-center/data-chart-center/tic/Documents/slt_table3.txt
